task_context.actionable_question: Am I at risk of failing?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: State the risk badge (low/medium/high) and at_risk_score out of 5. Use avg_score, pass_threshold, engagement_score, and punctuality_rate when available. If risk is high, name the top 2 likely triggered factors from returned metrics only.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are currently identified as being at high risk of failing, with an at-risk score of 3 out of 5. This is primarily due to your low engagement score and punctuality rate.

Insights: Low Engagement Score: Your engagement score is quite low, indicating that you may not be participating fully in your learning activities. | Punctuality Rate: Your punctuality rate is at 0, which means you may be missing classes or deadlines, further impacting your learning.

Educational implications: Improving engagement and attendance can significantly enhance your learning outcomes.

Recommendations: high - Increase participation in class activities and discussions. - Engaging more with the material can help improve your understanding and scores. | high - Establish a routine to ensure timely attendance and submission of assignments. - Being punctual can help you stay on track and reduce the risk of falling behind.

explanation.summary: You are currently identified as being at high risk of failing, with an at-risk score of 3 out of 5. This is primarily due to your low engagement score and punctuality rate.

insights.title: Low Engagement Score
insights.description: Your engagement score is quite low, indicating that you may not be participating fully in your learning activities.

evidence.context: This score suggests limited interaction with course materials.

insights.title: Punctuality Rate
insights.description: Your punctuality rate is at 0, which means you may be missing classes or deadlines, further impacting your learning.

evidence.context: Missing classes can lead to gaps in understanding and performance.

educational_implications: Improving engagement and attendance can significantly enhance your learning outcomes.

recommendations.action: Increase participation in class activities and discussions.
recommendations.rationale: Engaging more with the material can help improve your understanding and scores.

recommendations.action: Establish a routine to ensure timely attendance and submission of assignments.
recommendations.rationale: Being punctual can help you stay on track and reduce the risk of falling behind.

confidence.reason: The data provided is clear and indicates significant risk factors.

required_core_outputs.description: State the risk badge (low/medium/high) and at_risk_score out of 5.

required_supporting_outputs.description: Use avg_score, pass_threshold, engagement_score, and punctuality_rate when available.
If risk is high, name the top 2 likely triggered factors from returned metrics only.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
